findings.text: NAP-SRC-0006 OCR output is largely garbled and illegible; no coherent text recovered.
NAP-SRC-0007 shows a payment confirmation of £30.00 (GBP) from Edinburgh Napier University, reference ENU447436, student number 40805511.
NAP-SRC-0019 is a rent arrears letter for £5,526.66 addressed to Anfal Elbushra, with NTQ date 18 May 2026 and payment required by 9 May 2026.
NAP-SRC-0020 is a Notice to Quit from Edinburgh Napier University requiring vacation of Bedroom B, Flat 05, Castlelaw House.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Re-OCR Assessment

### Sources
- **NAP-SRC-0006**: Tesseract output is garbled (confidence 0.65). Likely a screenshot of a payment or communication. Re-OCR with cloud engine recommended.
- **NAP-SRC-0007**: Payment confirmation for £30.00. Some fields truncated. Re-OCR to capture full details.
- **NAP-SRC-0019**: Rent arrears letter for £5,526.66. Garbled sections may contain guarantor info. Re-OCR to recover full text.
- **NAP-SRC-0020**: Notice to Quit. Truncated termination date and move-out instructions. Re-OCR to complete.

### Recommendation
Submit all four JPEGs to a cloud-based OCR engine (e.g., Google Cloud Vision, Azure OCR) to improve accuracy and recover missing text. Expected cost: < $0.10.
proposed_artifacts.title: Re-OCR Assessment Report

proposed_tasks.instructions: Re-run OCR on source images NAP-SRC-0006, NAP-SRC-0007, NAP-SRC-0019, and NAP-SRC-0020 using a cloud-based OCR engine (e.g., Google Cloud Vision or Azure Computer Vision). Output extracted text as candidate artifacts. Compare with existing Tesseract output and flag any new recoverable information.
proposed_tasks.title: Cloud-based re-OCR of four source images

risk_flags.text: NAP-SRC-0006 is effectively unreadable; critical evidence may be lost without re-OCR.
The arrears letter references a guarantor; missing OCR may obscure guarantor identity and liability.
Notice to Quit text is truncated; the effective termination date and move-out arrangements are incomplete.

summary: Tesseract OCR of four source images (NAP-SRC-0006, 0007, 0019, 0020) produced low-confidence (0.65) text with garbled characters, truncation, and missing fields. NAP-SRC-0006 is nearly illegible. NAP-SRC-0007 shows a £30 payment confirmation. NAP-SRC-0019 is a rent arrears letter for £5,526.66 with an NTQ date of 18 May 2026. NAP-SRC-0020 is a Notice to Quit. Re-OCR with a cloud-based engine is recommended to recover accurate text.

uncertainties.text: NAP-SRC-0006 content is unreadable; it may contain additional relevant information (e.g., payment details, correspondence).
NAP-SRC-0007 OCR may have missed the bank authorisation number and other details due to truncation.
OCR garbled portions in NAP-SRC-0019 and NAP-SRC-0020 may omit guarantor details, signature, or dates.
